v0.4.0.description:
New:
- Arx has been added, and with that the whole game from start to finish is playable
- Arx has its respective hit list goal as well containing: Loic the Immaculate, Voidwoken Bloodfury, Sanguinia Tell, Karon, Isbeil, Thorny Suncaller, Lord Linder Kemm, Adramahlihk, Contaminated Horror, and Braccus Rex
- Grenades and runes have been added to the filler pool
- The client will now let you know when a hit has been completed and what your remaining hits are

Previous Act Changes:
- Non hostile Trompdoy checks have been replaced with the hostile Trompdoy checks
- The magisters on the boat during the Reaper's Eye encounter with Daeyena have been added as checks
- Removed Flourescent Voidlings as checks as them blowing up does not trigger a kill and thus are missable
- Healing Touch and Most Dangerous When Cornered are now separate
- The Eternal Worshipper, Hot Under the Collar, Metalwork (The Forgotten and the Damned sub quest), Burial Rites, and A Trial for All Seasons are now included

Bugfixes:
- Choosing the communication directory actually works now, and will no longer save files in incorrect directories or save the incorrect directory itself (by crashing but alas)
- Deathlink interactions regarding custom characters now work as expected
- Killing or being killed under the effect of chicken or cow form will now correctly send checks/deathlinks
- A Fate Worse Than Death works now
- Siding with the magisters during Window of Opportunity works now


Setup Guide [here](https://github.com/Intaiachi/ArchipelagoDOS2/blob/main/worlds/dos2/docs/steup_en.md)

DOS2 mod pak file [Github](https://github.com/Intaiachi/DOS2-Archipelago-Mod/releases), [Steam Workshop](https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3741893354)
v0.4.0.title: v0.4.0 Release
